product_overview: A deterministic risk calculator for crypto traders that computes position size from capital, risk %, entry and stop-loss, and saves trades to a localStorage-backed journal for AI-driven discipline evaluation.
core_goals: Provide a mathematically precise position size calculator using the specified formula
Enforce strict input validation (no division by zero, no negative values, risk ≤ 5%)
Persist trades locally in localStorage using a defined JSON object structure
Allow users to review, mark outcomes (Won/Lost), and delete journal entries
Provide an AI-based evaluation (Gemini) to give behavioral feedback on journaled trades
Make the app test-friendly with stable data-testid anchors for E2E testing in a real browser

features.name: Risk Calculator
features.description: Calculate deterministic position size from user inputs (capital, risk %, entry, stop loss, target ratio) and save valid trades to the journal.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill Asset Pair input field (data-testid="input-asset") -> Fill Capital input field (data-testid="input-modal") -> Fill Risk % input field (data-testid="input-risiko") with a value ≤ 5 -> Fill Entry Price input field (data-testid="input-entry") -> Fill Stop Loss Price input field (data-testid="input-stoploss") with a different value -> Fill Target Ratio input field (data-testid="input-ratio") -> Click "Save to Journal" button (data-testid="btn-calculate") -> See new journal entry saved to localStorage

Navigate to / -> Fill Capital input field (data-testid="input-modal") -> Fill Risk % input field (data-testid="input-risiko") -> Fill Entry Price input field (data-testid="input-entry") -> Fill Stop Loss Price input field (data-testid="input-stoploss") with the same value as Entry Price -> See error message "Invalid price distance" -> See Save button (data-testid="btn-calculate") disabled

Navigate to / -> Fill Capital input field (data-testid="input-modal") -> Fill Risk % input field (data-testid="input-risiko") with a value > 5 -> See validation error "Risk must be 5% or less" -> See Save button (data-testid="btn-calculate") disabled

Navigate to / -> Fill Capital input field (data-testid="input-modal") with a negative number -> See validation error "Inputs must be non-negative" -> See Save button (data-testid="btn-calculate") disabled

features.name: Trading Journal
features.description: List, update status, and manage trade entries persisted in localStorage as defined objects (id, date, asset_pair, capital, risk, entry_price, stop_loss_price, position_size, target_ratio, status).
user_flows: Navigate to /journal -> View trade entries listed from localStorage
Navigate to /journal -> View trade entries -> Click "Winning" button (data-testid="btn-won") on a selected entry -> See trade status updated to "Won" in the UI and in localStorage
Navigate to /journal -> View trade entries -> Click "Losing" button (data-testid="btn-lost") on a selected entry -> See trade status updated to "Lost" in the UI and in localStorage
Navigate to /journal -> View trade entries -> Click Delete icon (data-testid="btn-delete") on a selected entry -> See entry removed from the list and localStorage
Navigate to /journal -> Click "Delete All" (data-testid="btn-delete-all") -> See journal cleared and localStorage empty
Navigate to /journal -> See no entries message when journal is empty -> See "Evaluate My Journal" button (data-testid="btn-roast") disabled

features.name: AI Risk Evaluator (Roast)
features.description: Send journal data to the /api/roast endpoint (Gemini) to receive an AI 'roast' assessing trading discipline; show loading state and display the AI response in the UI.
user_flows: Navigate to /journal -> Ensure at least one journal entry exists -> Click "Evaluate My Journal" button (data-testid="btn-roast") -> See button text change to "Analyzing Discipline..." -> See AI roast feedback message displayed in the UI
Navigate to /journal -> See no entries -> See "Evaluate My Journal" button (data-testid="btn-roast") disabled (cannot trigger AI call)

Navigate to / -> Fill Capital input field (data-testid="input-modal") -> Fill Risk % input field (data-testid="input-risiko") -> Fill Entry Price input field (data-testid="input-entry") -> Fill Stop Loss Price input field (data-testid="input-stoploss") -> Fill Target Ratio input field (data-testid="input-ratio") with an unrealistic ratio (e.g., 1:15) -> Click "Save to Journal" button (data-testid="btn-calculate") -> Navigate to /journal -> Click "Evaluate My Journal" button (data-testid="btn-roast") -> See button text change to "Analyzing Discipline..." -> See AI roast feedback message containing the phrase "greedy dreamers"

routes.description: Risk Calculator and Journal entry page
Trading Journal where entries are listed and evaluated by AI

features.name: Risk Calculator
features.description: Calculates position size based on capital, risk %, entry price, and stop loss.
user_interactions: Fill Stop Loss Price input field (data-testid="input-stoploss")

features.name: Trading Journal
features.description: List and manage trading history stored in localStorage.
user_interactions: Click "Winning" button (data-testid="btn-won") to mark trade as Won
Click "Losing" button (data-testid="btn-lost") to mark trade as Lost
Click Delete icon (data-testid="btn-delete") to remove an entry

features.name: AI Risk Evaluator (Roast)
features.description: Uses Gemini AI to evaluate trading discipline based on journal data.
